title: The California ZEV Mandate: Policy Origins and Dynamics
summary: In his presentation on the California Zero Emissions Vehicles (ZEV) mandate, Gustavo Collantes offers some policy and environmental context for the legislation, ways in which he undertook his study, policy dynamics during discussions about ZEV, and “lessons learned” and overall take-aways.
authors: Mengying Wu, Kristen McCormack, William A. Scott, Aaron Smith, Jingran Zhang
body: Presentation at the ETIP Seminar Series The latest from Belfer See more In his presentation on the California Zero Emissions Vehicles (ZEV) mandate, Gustavo Collantes offers some policy and environmental context for the legislation, ways in which he undertook his study, policy dynamics during discussions about ZEV, and “lessons learned” and overall take-aways.
